name: Dahl Palak (Spinach & Split Peas)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the split peas in 2 cups of water for 1 hour.
2. Add turmeric and 1/2 tsp salt to the soaked split peas. Bring to a boil using the same water used to soak the peas, then simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Add the chopped spinach to the mixture and cook until most of the liquid has been absorbed and the split peas are tender.
4. In a separate skillet, heat butter/oleo over medium heat. Add ginger and garlic, and cook until the garlic turns golden.
5. Stir in the Garam Masala from another recipe.
6. Immediately add the seasoned ginger and garlic mixture to the spinach-split pea combination.
7. Add lemon juice and season with salt to taste before serving.
